mapper.select: SELECT * FROM books WHERE deleted = FALSE ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT * FROM books WHERE deleted = FALSE
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
AND author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{author}, '%')
AND category = #{category}
ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM books WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO books (title, author, isbn, category, published_year, deleted, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{author}, #{isbn}, #{category}, #{publishedYear}, FALSE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE books SET title = #{title}, author = #{author}, isbn = #{isbn}, category = #{category}, published_year = #{publishedYear}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
UPDATE books SET deleted = TRUE, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
